hero.subtitle: Set the rhythm for the community: join the first music contest by PizzaDAO and Musicaw3 for the Spanish-speaking world.

rules.title: Contest Rules
rules.subtitle: Read the rules before submitting
items: Language: The song must be in Spanish.
Theme: Content must be centered around Pizza or PizzaDAO.
Submission: Submit your entry via a YouTube link of the song.
License: By submitting, you agree to license your work under CC0 (Public Domain); only original works will be accepted.
Participation: A maximum of 2 songs per author or collective is allowed.
Selection: 10 songs will be chosen for the first official PizzaDAO album in Spanish; deadline is May 4.
Prizes: From the 10 selected for the album, 3 winners will receive prizes in USDC.
Process: On May 5, selection begins in the PizzaDAO Discord, announced via official channels and Música W3.
Rules: The organization reserves the right to disqualify submissions that do not comply with these rules.

modal.title: Submit your song
modal.walletHint: To receive the prize. Ethereum, Polygon or other EVM.
modal.cc0Label: I agree to license my song under CC0 (public domain)
modal.errorRequired: Fill in the required fields (email and social media) and accept the CC0 license.
modal.errorYoutube: Please enter a valid YouTube link.
modal.errorGeneral: An error occurred. Please try again.

game.subtitle: A gaming experience integrated with the PizzaDAO and Música Web3 community. Win, compete and listen.
game.feat1desc: Contest winning songs play inside the game. Your track, in the world.
game.feat2desc: Unique mechanics inspired by PizzaDAO culture and decentralized economy.
game.feat3desc: Compete in community tournaments and win real rewards.
game.comingSoon: The game is in active development. Submit your song now — winning tracks will be part of the official soundtrack.

alliance.title: PizzaDAO × Música Web3
alliance.subtitle: Two communities united by music, pizza and web3. An alliance to celebrate Hispanic creativity.

footer.cc0: This site is CC0 — Public Domain
